originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__wakeup_1' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'wakeup' is never read
reasoning: wakeup is assigned at L6 inside #ifndef CONFIG_BF60x but never read afterwards — genuine dead store. Declaration at L3 is marked // ERROR, confirming this is a VBDB-known bug. PC = !CONFIG_BF60x correctly captures when the assignment is active. No library macros.
